title: Home Gym Storage Caddy
summary: Full plans to build yourself a mobile storage caddy.
description: Full plans to build yourself a mobile storage caddy. This caddy can be used in so many rooms in the house and for so many various purposes. This build is done completely out of plywood.

steps.title: Cut out the bottom piece
steps.body: Using your Kreg Accu-Cut Circular Saw Track Guide, cut the bottom piece to 14" x 14".

steps.title: Cut out the side pieces
steps.body: Using your Kreg Accu-Cut Circular Saw Track Guide, cut two side pieces to 14" x 16" and two additional side pieces to 15 1/2" x 22".

steps.title: Cut curves into side piece
steps.body: Using a jigsaw, round out one edge of each of the taller (22") side pieces. Using a jigsaw, cut out 5" x 2" rectangle holes in the center of the longer curved piece.

steps.title: Drill all necessary pocket holes
steps.body:
Using the Kreg® Pocket-Hole Jig 720PRO drill pocket holes at 6" intervals along two sides of the bottom piece.
Drill 3 pocket holes along the lower edge of the taller side pieces at 6" intervals.

steps.title: Assemble the Entire Caddy
steps.body: Using the pocket screws and wood glue, assemble the caddy. Attach the side pieces to the bottom piece and secure with pocket screws. Then attach the other 2 side pieces using the pocket holes and screws.

steps.title: Add Castor Wheels
steps.body: Attach wheels to make caddy mobile

steps.title: Finish Caddy
steps.body: Sand wood caddy all over. OPTIONAL: Apply a wood stain or finish of your choice.
